title: Our First Participation
description: IEEE IAS ENIS SBC represented the chapter at the IAS Annual Meeting, connecting with international IEEE IAS members and showcasing our student branch activities.
highlights: Chapter representation at the international level

title: Growing Our Presence
description: Building on the previous year, our chapter continued its active participation in the IAS Annual Meeting, strengthening international ties and sharing our achievements with the global IEEE community.

title: Awards and Recognition
description: A landmark year for IEEE IAS ENIS SBC — our chapter received multiple prestigious awards at the IAS Annual Meeting, including the IEEE IAS CMD Outstanding Member Award, Best Website Award, and Best IAS Tunisia Student Branch Chapter.
highlights: IEEE IAS CMD Outstanding Member Award — Amir Abid
IEEE IAS CMD Chapter Best Website Award
Best IAS Tunisia Student Branch Chapter
IEEE IAS CMD Humanitarian Award contest

title: Continuing Excellence
description: IEEE IAS ENIS SBC continued its strong tradition of participation at the IAS Annual Meeting, representing the chapter and furthering its international IEEE presence. The chapter presented new achievements, including recognition in the IEEE Smart Village student project competition.
highlights: Third prize in IEEE Smart Village (ISV) student project competition — Ahmed Jallouli
